questions.question: Why is protein described as 'non-negotiable for mental health'?

options.text: It helps you build muscle for exercise
It slows carbohydrate absorption and provides amino acids that are building blocks for mood-regulating neurotransmitters

questions.explanation: Protein dramatically slows the absorption of carbohydrates, preventing blood sugar spikes. More importantly, proteins are made of amino acids -- the literal building blocks for neurotransmitters like serotonin (from Tryptophan) and dopamine (from Tyrosine).

questions.question: What percentage of your brain is made up of fat?
questions.explanation: Your brain is nearly 60% fat. It needs a constant supply of good fats to build cell membranes, reduce inflammation, and facilitate communication between brain cells.

questions.question: Which amino acid does your brain need to make serotonin (the mood neurotransmitter)?
questions.explanation: Your brain needs the amino acid Tryptophan to make serotonin, which regulates mood. Tyrosine is the amino acid used to make dopamine, which supports focus and motivation.

questions.question: What are Omega-3 fatty acids and why are they important for mental health?

options.text: A type of sugar that provides quick energy
Anti-inflammatory fats found in salmon, walnuts, and flaxseeds that are crucial for mood regulation
A vitamin supplement that replaces healthy eating
A type of carbohydrate found in bread

questions.explanation: Omega-3 fatty acids (found in fatty fish like salmon, walnuts, and flaxseeds) are powerfully anti-inflammatory and crucial for mood regulation. They help create strong, flexible brain cell walls that allow good signals to pass through easily.

questions.question: What combination of nutrients at each meal is the key to getting off the blood sugar rollercoaster?
questions.explanation: Combining protein, healthy fat, and fiber at each meal is the key to getting off the blood sugar rollercoaster. This combination slows digestion and provides steady, long-lasting energy for stable mood and focus.

title: Powering Up with Protein and Healthy Fats - Quiz
